mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_coach_comment_reply (comment_id, reply_content, reply_by) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{replyContent}, #{replyBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, comment_id AS commentId, reply_content AS replyContent, reply_by AS replyBy, DATE_FORMAT(reply_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS replyTime FROM pt_coach_comment_reply WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY reply_time ASC, id ASC
